Group Companies
PEW Engineering Pvt. Ltd.

The Company is a dedicated manufacturer of Brake System Components i.e Brake Cylinders, Reservoirs, Angle Cocks, Check Valves, Isolating Cocks as well as Empty Load Boxes.

Read More
Lalbaba Industrial Corporation Pvt. Ltd.

Lalbaba Industrial Corporation Pvt. Ltd. is engaged in the manufactuirng of critical forgings and fabrication items for application in Wagon and Carriage for Railways, as well as for use in the Automobile Industry, Steel Plants.

Read More
Lalbaba Seamless Tubes Pvt. Ltd.

Lal Baba Seamless Tubes Pvt. Ltd. (LBST) is a leading manufacturer of Cold Drawn Carbon Steel Seamless Tubes with an installed output capacity of 36000 Metric Tonnes per annum.

Read More
Swamiji Transmission Pvt. Ltd.

Fittings and Accessories for Phase Conductor, Ground Wire, OPGW, AB Cables, Clamps and Connector.

Read More
Our Group

The LBIC Engineering Group was founded in 1961 by Mr. Murari Lal Dhanuka in Howrah which was the heart of Melting and Processing units of ferrous based industries in the then India, by setting up a small pneumatic forging and fabrication unit. In true sense, he started it from scratch. But his quest and untiring efforts to set an example of excellence, has brought the group to currently being a leading and preferred supplier for Indian Railways (IR) as well as OEMs.

Today, the group has in its fold multiple manufacturing facilities spread over the entire Industrial belt in the state of West Bengal, India.

Read More
Vision

To become a world class industry and a preferred vendor benchmarked accross all verticals.

Mission
  • To deliver world class products at competitive prices, on demand
  • Provide superior service to customers by developing leading-edge solutions in technology and processes
  • Providing opportunities for inclusive growth for employees, by nurturing human resource, so that all our partners can share in the pride of a successful enterprise

Corporate office
27, Shakespeare Sarani
3rd Floor, Kolkata - 700017
